name: Lakshmi Niwas
overview: Born into wealth, Lakshmi chooses love over privilege and leads a life of sacrifice with Shriniwas. Years later, the couple still pursues a home of their own and their daughter’s perfect wedding.

trailers.title: Lakshmi Niwas - लक्ष्मी निवास - Starts From 12th January - 8 PM - Promo - New Serial - Zee TV
